title: Clinically Meaningful Numeric Scatterplots
objective: Inspect age, maximum heart rate, cholesterol, blood pressure, and ST depression pair structure by disease class.
method: Generated scatterplots for age vs thalach and trestbps vs chol, colored by binary disease status and styled by cohort.
results: Age vs thalach shows lower maximum heart rates among many disease-present records.
Blood-pressure/cholesterol scatter is heavily affected by unavailable cholesterol in Swiss and Long Beach VA cohorts.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Scatterplots are visual diagnostics only and should not be read as adjusted effects.
